_provenance: schema-derived from math_engine.is_in_open_window_grace contract (V2 AC-V2.1). Fields match the pure helper signature. No producer-computed floats — inputs are named-constant times; expected output is a boolean property assertion.
description: Basic grace window cases: inside grace, at boundary, past boundary

cases.label: inside_grace_10_35
cases.note: 10:35 is 5 min after 10:30 — well inside 15-min grace

cases.label: inside_grace_boundary_10_44_59
cases.note: 1 second before grace ends — still suppressed

cases.label: at_grace_boundary_10_45
cases.note: Exactly EXECUTION_START_TIME + 15 min: grace has expired, VWAP may fire

cases.label: past_boundary_10_45_01
cases.note: 1 second past grace end — VWAP fires normally
